name: Crunchy Caramel Chocolate Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine with molasses over low heat.
2. Stir in rice chex; press into a 9-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
4. Melt caramels with milk in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth.
5. Pour over crust; sprinkle with chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Cool; cut into squares or bars.
